# Al Mehfuz - Khanqah-e-Qadriya Shattariyah

> Al Mehfuz is a sanctuary of peace, remembrance (Dhikr), and spiritual learning rooted in the blessed Qadriya Shattariyah tradition. Located in Chikhli, Gujarat, India.

## Website
- URL: https://almehfuz.org
- Languages: English, Urdu (اردو), Arabic (العربية), Hindi (हिन्दी)
- Full context: https://almehfuz.org/llms-full.txt

## Leadership
- Sajjada Nashin: Hazrat Syed Abrar Ahmed
- Naib Sajjada Nashin: Hazrat Syed Nakib Muzafar Ali

## Pages
- [Home](https://almehfuz.org/en): Main landing page with prayer times, purpose, teachings, and visit info
- [About](https://almehfuz.org/en/about): History, mission, values, and spiritual lineage (Silsila)
- [Activities](https://almehfuz.org/en/activities): Daily prayer schedule, weekly gatherings, upcoming events, visitor etiquette
- [Teachings](https://almehfuz.org/en/teachings): Blog posts and spiritual teachings from the Qadri and Shattari traditions
- [Gallery](https://almehfuz.org/en/gallery): Photos and videos from gatherings and events
- [Contact](https://almehfuz.org/en/contact): Contact form, address, phone, email, visiting hours, Google Maps
- [Iraadat](https://almehfuz.org/en/iraadat): Benefits of joining the Qadriya Shattariyah Silsila

## Core Values
- Sincerity (Ikhlas): Pure intention in all actions and worship
- Respect (Adab): Proper etiquette toward the Divine, teachers, and fellow seekers
- Love for the Prophet ﷺ: Central to all spiritual practice
- Service (Khidmaat): Dedicated to serving all people regardless of background
- Tradition: Preservation of an unbroken chain of spiritual masters (Silsila)

## Key Concepts
- Iraadat: Spiritual devotion to a guide, receiving a structured path toward divine closeness
- Qadriya Shattariyah Silsila: The specific spiritual lineage and path of practices
- Dhikr: Communal and individual remembrance of Allah
- Khanqah: A place of spiritual retreat and learning

## Contact Information
- Address: Khankah Sharif, Mehfuz Baugh, Thala, Chikhli, Gujarat 396521, India
- Email: info@almehfuz.org
- Phone: +91 81289 27862
- Timings: Open daily from Fajr to Isha
